python-engineer.description: Implements small, well-tested Python changes using uv, ruff, ty, and pytest.

check.description: Run format, lint, type, test, and build checks
check.template: Run the project checks and report failures clearly: `uv run ruff format --check`, `uv run ruff check`, `uv run ty check`, `uv run pytest`, and `uv build`.

grill-me.template: Use the grill-me skill to stress-test this plan or design: $ARGUMENTS
